expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: The result.md explicitly addresses the focus requirement under “Case focus (blocking): cross-feature non-regression” and concludes: “PASS (based on snapshot evidence): The orchestrator contract remains generic... Report-editor improvements... are implemented as policy + evidence requirements... rather than changes that would alter ... for unrelated feature planning flows.”

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: The result.md explicitly frames the deliverable as a holdout checkpoint artifact: “Primary phase alignment: holdout” and “required output is a regression-focused verification note...”. It also states “Deliverable for holdout checkpoint” and “Holdout checkpoint satisfied,” matching the holdout_regression expectation.
